name: Paper Plane

spec.method_detail: Shake with ice. Double strain into chilled coupe.

history: Sam Ross created the Paper Plane at Milk & Honey in New York in 2008, inspired by M.I.A.'s song. It's a direct descendant of the Last Word — same equal-parts structure, different ingredients. Four spirits that shouldn't work together (bourbon + Italian aperitivo + herbal amaro + citrus) that work perfectly together. It represents the modern craft cocktail movement's ability to take a historical template and create something genuinely new.
